intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把送行计划、海港地点和大西洋比赛挑战读顺。

sentences.text: Our neighbour, Captain Charles Alison, will sail from Portsmouth tomorrow.
sentences.focus_zh: Captain 是船长；will sail 是明天的出海计划；Portsmouth 是英国的港口城市。

sentences.text: We'll meet him at the harbour early in the morning.
sentences.focus_zh: We'll meet him 是送行安排；harbour 是船停靠和出发的海港。

sentences.text: He will be in his small boat, Topsail.
sentences.focus_zh: will be in 说明船长明天会在船上；Topsail 是船名。

sentences.text: Topsail is a famous little boat. It has sailed across the Atlantic many times.
sentences.focus_zh: famous little boat 说明它有名；has sailed across the Atlantic 是这艘船过去到现在的经验。

sentences.text: Captain Alison will set out at eight o'clock, so we'll have plenty of time.
sentences.focus_zh: set out 是启程；eight o'clock 给出时间；plenty of time 表示时间充裕。

sentences.text: We'll see his boat and then we'll say goodbye to him.
sentences.focus_zh: then 帮你读出顺序：先看船，然后告别。

sentences.text: He will be away for two months. We are very proud of him.
sentences.focus_zh: will be away for two months 是未来离开两个月；proud of him 是为他感到自豪。

sentences.text: He will take part in an important race across the Atlantic.
sentences.focus_zh: take part in 是参加；important race across the Atlantic 说明这不是普通旅行，而是重要挑战。
